key.name: activation-method
key.description: How to activate the spotlight: ctrl-l, ctrl-r, shake, custom

key.name: activation-shortcut
key.description: Custom keyboard shortcut to activate the spotlight

key.name: only-with-windows-key
key.description: Require holding Windows key when using Ctrl activation method

key.name: shake-distance
key.description: Minimum distance in pixels the pointer must travel to detect shake (PowerToys default: 1000)

key.name: shake-interval
key.description: Time window in ms to monitor mouse movement for shake detection (PowerToys default: 1000)

key.name: shake-sensitivity
key.description: How much farther the pointer must travel than the diagonal of movement rectangle (PowerToys default: 400% = 4x)

key.name: do-not-activate-gamemode
key.summary: Do not activate in Game Mode
key.description: Prevents spotlight when Game Mode is on

key.name: background-color
key.description: Color of the spotlight backdrop with alpha (PowerToys default: #00000080 = black 50%)

key.name: spotlight-color
key.description: Color of the circle that centers on the cursor (PowerToys default: #FFFFFF80 = white 50%)

key.name: spotlight-radius
key.description: Radius of the circle in pixels (PowerToys default: 100)

key.name: spotlight-zoom
key.description: Initial zoom factor for animation - starts big and shrinks (PowerToys default: 9x)

key.name: idle-timeout
key.description: Time in ms to wait after mouse stops moving before hiding spotlight (PowerToys default: 1000)

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of fade-out animation in ms (PowerToys default: 500)

key.name: excluded-apps
key.description: List of application names to exclude from activation
